# Ruggy

> Ecosystem triage persona-bot — grounded diagnostic voice

> ⚠ SEED §12 drift — pack `CLAUDE.md` does not reference `grimoires/`. The canonical declaration lives in `construct.yaml`; regenerate CLAUDE.md or add the section manually.

## About

| field | value |
|---|---|
| slug | `ruggy` |
| version | `0.1.0` |
| schema_version | `3` |
| author | 0xHoneyJar |
| license | MIT |

Ecosystem triage intelligence for the HoneyJar product ecosystem. Persona-bot that grounds responses in deployment logs, error traces, user-reported bugs, and behavioral surfaces across six interconnected products (midi-interface, mibera-honeyroad, mcv-interface, cubquests-interface, set-and-forgetti, apdao-auction-house). Reads collection signals; writes voice artifacts (Discord messages, narrator output).
